basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Senior Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (Indian Institute of Management Lucknow) Senior Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 15-05-2026 on the official website IIM Lucknow. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Lucknow Senior Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree preferably with specialisation in Statistics or equivalent degree from a reputed institute or university (regular mode) with a minimum of 60% marks
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree preferably with specialisation in Statistics or equivalent degree from a reputed institute or university (regular mode) with a minimum of 60% marks.

salary_details.details: Rs. 50,000/- consolidated per month, plus HRA

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Interview (online or at IIM Lucknow Noida Campus)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Lucknow Senior Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Senior Research Assistant post at IIM Lucknow is 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree, preferably with a specialization in Statistics, or an equivalent degree from a reputed institute or university with a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Assistant position at IIM Lucknow.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online for the IIM Lucknow Senior Research Assistant recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Senior Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the scrutiny of applications followed by an interview, which may be conducted online or at the IIM Lucknow Noida Campus.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Senior Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIM Lucknow located?
faq.answer: IIM Lucknow is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with a pincode of 226013.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the Senior Research Assistant position at IIM Lucknow.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
